title: Phantom of the Rue Morgue
writer: Edgar Allan Poe, Harold Medford, James R. Webb
actors: Karl Malden, Claude Dauphin, Patricia Medina
plot: When several women are found mutilated and murdered, the Paris police are baffled as to who the killer may be. All evidence points to Dupin, but soon it becomes apparent that it is someone (or something) stronger and deadlier than...
